subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth is indeed the Treasury of My power and the Repository of My sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه لمخزن قدرتی و مکمن اقتداری و
